GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [l_returnflag@0 ASC NULLS LAST, l_linestatus@1 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_returnflag, l_linestatus], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_quantity), sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice), sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount), sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount * Int64(1) + lineitem.l_tax), avg(lineitem.l_quantity), avg(lineitem.l_extendedprice), avg(lineitem.l_discount), count(*)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_returnflag@0, l_linestatus@1], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_returnflag, l_linestatus], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_quantity), sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice), sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount), sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount * Int64(1) + lineitem.l_tax), avg(lineitem.l_quantity), avg(lineitem.l_extendedprice), avg(lineitem.l_discount), count(*)]
              GpuProjectExec
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                  GpuFilterExec
                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=5478274
--- memory ---
total_cost=3600
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=184, subtree_max_row_bytes=392, input_bytes=184, output_bytes=184, cost=368
  GpuSortExec: row_width=184, subtree_max_row_bytes=392, input_bytes=184, output_bytes=184, cost=368
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=184, subtree_max_row_bytes=392, input_bytes=184, output_bytes=184, cost=368
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=184, subtree_max_row_bytes=392, input_bytes=208, output_bytes=184, cost=392
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=208, subtree_max_row_bytes=352, input_bytes=208, output_bytes=208, cost=416
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=208, subtree_max_row_bytes=352, input_bytes=208, output_bytes=208, cost=416
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=208, subtree_max_row_bytes=352, input_bytes=144, output_bytes=208, cost=352
              GpuProjectExec: row_width=144, subtree_max_row_bytes=272, input_bytes=128, output_bytes=144, cost=272
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=128, subtree_max_row_bytes=260, input_bytes=128, output_bytes=128, cost=256
                  GpuFilterExec: row_width=128, subtree_max_row_bytes=260, input_bytes=132, output_bytes=128, cost=260
                    GpuScanExec: row_width=132, subtree_max_row_bytes=132, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=132, cost=132
